creator: mutoh@openedu.org
text:
Upgrade lang/squeak port to 3.9-7.

Fix: Extract uudecode file attached (here called squeak.uu), and do below:
$ uudecode squeak.uu
$ tar zxvf squeak.tar.gz
$ cd squeak
$ make install

Attached file is full archive of lang/squeak, 
 because of patch becomes bigger than this archive.



--
Takeshi MUTOH	<mutoh@openedu.org>--njASGzBjQrs3rvaFZTvwkju7KqLArJlrx57w8hizNwifykni
Content-Type: text/plain; name="squeak.tar.gz"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="squeak.tar.gz"
